title: The Iron Veil
author: Toom Originals
description: In the forge-city of Ashmark, master blacksmith Kaden can do what no other can: smelt weapons from memories. When a hooded stranger offers him her most painful recollection to craft the ultimate blade, Kaden discovers the memory belongs to someone he once buried. A story of grief forged into steel, and vengeance that cuts both ways.

title: Starweave Chronicles
author: Toom Originals
description: Lyra is the last Starweaver — a celestial artisan who rewrites fate by rearranging constellations. When she accidentally unravels the destiny of warrior prince Caelen, she must travel with him through time-fractured lands to restore what she broke. What begins as obligation slowly becomes the only star she cannot bear to change.

title: Hollow Saints
author: Toom Originals
description: The Order of Hollow Saints hunts corrupted spirits across a post-calamity wasteland. Seventeen-year-old Mira is their most gifted tracker — until a forbidden ritual reveals she has been a Hollow wearing human skin all along. Now hunted by the order she calls family, she must decide: become the monster, or prove that monsters can choose otherwise.

title: Crimson Protocol
author: Toom Originals
description: City-state KRON-7 outlawed emotions after the Grief Riots of 2074. Agent Zero enforces compliance — scanning citizens for illegal feelings, suppressing uprisings with chemical precision. He is perfect. He is empty. Until he arrests a woman named Vael who feels everything — and refuses to stop. Now he's breaking protocol for the first time in his life.

title: Duskborn
author: Toom Originals
description: Born at the precise threshold between day and night, Kael exists in both the sunlit world of the living and the shadow realm of the Dusk. Both sides have laws. Both sides want him eliminated. Armed with a shadow blade that drinks sunlight and a sun shield that absorbs darkness, Kael carves his own existence through two worlds that refuse to share him.

title: The Cartographer's Lie
author: Toom Originals
description: Maps drawn with Voidink don't describe the world — they rewrite it. Asha inherits her father's cartography shop and discovers his final map is already reshaping the kingdom's geography, pulling mountains from their roots and drowning coastal cities. She has thirty days to unmake the map before her father's last lie swallows the world whole.

title: Echo Vault
author: Toom Originals
description: When Dr. Seren uploads her consciousness into a 10,000-year-old alien ruin to study its memory imprints, the connection cuts out — and she is trapped inside a fossilised civilisation's final hour. To escape, she must relive the extinction of an entire species, one memory at a time, while something ancient and awake realises it is no longer alone.

title: Thornwall Academy
author: Toom Originals
description: At Thornwall Academy, magic is unlocked through one's greatest fear. The more vivid the terror, the stronger the power. Transfer student Ren has no fears — because he died in this school three years ago, was resurrected without his memories, and is now unknowingly re-enrolled. The academy's dark secret is buried in the life he cannot remember.

title: Pale Horizon
author: Toom Originals
description: The Ashen War ended six months ago. Scout sergeant Vance can't stop running — from the battles, the losses, the silence. Field medic Lena can't stop healing — everyone except herself. When their routes converge at an abandoned lighthouse on the grey coast, they have to decide whether surviving is enough, or whether they're brave enough to actually live.

title: Devil's Arithmetic
author: Toom Originals
description: Math prodigy Noa has been top of her class since age six. What her teachers don't know: every equation she solves summons a demon from the Calculus Realm. The demons are bound to her answers and legally her servants. Now she has seventeen confused, bureaucratic demons following her through high school, and her calculus exam is in three days.

title: The Glass Empress
author: Toom Originals
description: Empress Evelline's body is composed of crystallised time — each difficult decision she makes fractures her further. When she shatters completely, time itself will cease. Her advisors want her to stop deciding. Her enemies want her to decide everything. A young historian tasked with cataloguing her cracks discovers a pattern that changes everything about her fate.

title: Zero Frequency
author: Toom Originals
description: After the Great Resonance shattered half the world's cities, all sound above 5Hz was permanently outlawed. Musician Zola communicates through tactile frequencies — vibrations felt through skin instead of heard. When she meets Eli, a deaf engineer building an illegal concert hall in the ruins, their forbidden love song is felt rather than heard, and it is changing everything.
